common.name: Name
common.title: Title
common.noResultsBody: No entries match the current search or filter.
common.noMatchesBody: No entries match your search or filters.

home.title: Today
home.subtitle: Overview of your pipeline and active tasks.

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Early contacts and inquiries, before they become customers.
leads.emptyBody: Create your first lead — or wait for inbound channels to deliver some.
leads.searchPlaceholder: Search name, company, email or phone…

disqualify.title: Disqualify lead
disqualify.body: Please provide a short reason. Disqualified leads are kept for reporting.

convert.title: Convert lead
convert.body: This lead becomes a customer. You can optionally create a first deal at the same time.

delete.title: Delete lead?
delete.body: This cannot be undone. Converted leads cannot be deleted.

detail.activitySubtitle: Notes, calls, emails, meetings and all system changes on the lead.
detail.addActivityPlaceholder: What happened? e.g. phone call, email reply, meeting note…
detail.activityDeleteDescription: The activity entry will be permanently removed — including from the audit log. This action cannot be undone.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage your customer relationships.
accounts.empty: Get started by creating your first account.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.subtitle: All quotes across your deals.
quotes.emptyBody: Create your first quote — start from a template or build it from scratch.
quotes.duplicateConfirmBody: A full copy of quote {{number}} will be created as a new draft — including line items, sections and linked attachments.
quotes.duplicateDialogBody: Pick the target customer and which contents to copy from quote {{number}}. The new quote will be created as a draft.
quotes.duplicateCrossOwnerHint: Owner {{name}} will be notified automatically via timeline entry and email.
quotes.duplicateLineItemsHint: Always copied — otherwise duplicating is meaningless.
quotes.bulkArchiveDialogBody: Archived quotes disappear from the default list and can be restored from the Archive tab at any time.

platformAdmin.title: Platform Administration
platformAdmin.subtitle: Provision tenants and review existing customers.
platformAdmin.createTenantSubtitle: Set tenant master data and the first admin account.
platformAdmin.createTenantDesc: Set tenant master data and the first admin account.
platformAdmin.validationErrorBody: Tenant name, admin details and a password with at least 8 characters are required.
platformAdmin.adminPasswordHint: At least 8 characters — to be changed at first login.
platformAdmin.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
platformAdmin.validationPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
platformAdmin.editTenantDesc: Change name, plan, region, internal notes — or temporarily disable this tenant.
platformAdmin.notesPlaceholder: Optional CRM notes — only visible to platform admins.
platformAdmin.disableConfirmBody: Disabling soft-deletes the tenant: it stays visible to platform admins but no users can sign in. This is reversible — you can reactivate at any time.
platformAdmin.reactivateConfirmBody: Reactivation restores normal access for all existing users.
platformAdmin.regionChangeWarning: Changing the region after provisioning may have data residency implications.
platformAdmin.secondOpinionSubtitle: Configure per critical AI workflow whether a second model runs in parallel for plausibility cross-check.
platformAdmin.secondOpinionDialogDesc: Per workflow, decide whether a second model runs as a critical reviewer. With an empty model field the heuristic picks an alternate Anthropic model: opus ↔ sonnet, haiku → sonnet.

tabs.noLinkedOrders: No order confirmation has been derived from this quote yet.
tabs.pdfMobileHint: Tap to open the PDF in a new tab.

quote.convertDialogDescription: A new order confirmation will be created from this accepted quote. Amount and terms are taken from the current version.
quote.convertOnlyAccepted: Only accepted quotes can be converted to an order.
quote.convertExistsBody: Order confirmation {{number}} was already created from this quote. Create another one anyway?

send.title: Send quote {{number}}
send.description: We will attach the quote as a PDF and deliver it to the selected recipients.
send.subject: Subject
send.attachmentHint: The file "quote-{{number}}.pdf" will be attached automatically.
send.noContactEmails: No contact email is on file for this account yet. Add recipients manually below or maintain the contacts on the account detail page.

quote.rejectDialogBody: You can optionally add a rejection reason — it will appear on the quote and in the audit log.

quotesNew.title: New Quote
quotesNew.subtitle: Pick a deal and start with the inline editor.

templates.title: Quote Templates
templates.subtitle: Industry templates with sections, line items and terms.
templates.emptyBody: Create your first template to build quotes faster and more consistently.

attachments.title: Attachment Library
attachments.subtitle: Reusable attachments such as DPA, SLA, datasheets.
attachments.emptyBody: Upload your first document — for example a datasheet, DPA or certificate.
attachments.missingFields: Please choose a name and a file
attachments.formatHint: Allowed: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, MD, CSV, TXT (max 25 MB)
attachments.dropToReplace: Click or drop a file to replace.

approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.subtitle: Review and manage your pending requests.
approvals.emptyBody: No approvals match your current filter.
approvals.emptyHint: Approvals are raised automatically from discounts, risky clauses or contract deviations.

clauseSuggestions.title: Clause Suggestions
clauseSuggestions.subtitle: Suggestions from active contract work — ad-hoc clauses and significantly edited variants land here for review.
clauseSuggestions.tileSubtitle: Review suggestions from contract work and adopt them into the library.
clauseSuggestions.thresholdsHint: How much an edited variant has to differ, and how often a suggestion must reappear before it shows up here.
clauseSuggestions.repeatThreshold: Repeat threshold for re-surfacing rejected suggestions
clauseSuggestions.empty: No suggestions in the current selection.
clauseSuggestions.queueDialogHint: This clause will be queued for review in the learning inbox.
clauseSuggestions.editClauseHint: Edits only affect this clause in this contract. If the diff is large, a suggestion is queued automatically.

clauses.title: Clause Library
clauses.subtitle: Standardised clause families with variants from soft to hard.
clauses.brandDefaultsHint: Default clause variant per brand and family. Applied automatically when new contracts are created.
clauses.clauseOverridesHint: Per-brand text/severity override per system variant. Applied when new contracts are created.
clauses.overrideUseBaseHint: Leave empty to use the standard text.
clauses.compatHint: Rules between clause variants: requires or conflicts. Tenant admin only.
clauses.translationsHint: Maintain one translation per language for each variant (German is the source). Rendered in contracts/quotes per contract language.
clauses.importNavHint: Upload PDF/DOCX, AI segments them into clause suggestions.

newClauseDialog.title: Add a new clause
newClauseDialog.description: Pick an existing family or create a new one, then describe the variant.
newClauseDialog.newFamilyDescriptionPlaceholder: Short purpose of the family — visible to authors.
newClauseDialog.variantBodyPlaceholder: Full clause text. Leave empty if you'll add language versions instead.
newClauseDialog.translationsHint: Provide DE and/or EN versions for this variant. Either body or translations should be filled in.
newClauseDialog.validateFamily: Please pick or create a family.
newClauseDialog.validateNewFamilyName: Please enter a family name (at least 2 characters).
newClauseDialog.validateBodyOrTranslation: Either provide a body text or at least one language version.
newClauseDialog.validateTranslationLocaleUnique: Each language can only be added once.
newClauseDialog.validateTranslationFields: Each language version needs a name and summary.

clauseImport.title: Import legacy contracts
clauseImport.subtitle: Upload PDF or DOCX legacy contracts. The AI splits them into clauses and suggests a mapping to existing families.
clauseImport.filePickError: Please select a PDF or DOCX file (max. 20 MB).
clauseImport.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Maximum upload size is 20 MB.
clauseImport.deleteJobConfirm: Delete this import job, file and all suggestions?
clauseImport.suggestionsEmpty: The AI did not find any clause candidates.
clauseImport.translationExists: A translation already exists for this variant. Edit it via the library or enable override.
clauseImport.errorAiNotConfigured: AI is not configured. Please set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
clauseImport.errorTextExtraction: Could not extract text from the document.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.subtitle: All contracts across your deals.
contracts.emptyBody: Create your first contract or import an external contract from a customer account.
contracts.riskScoreInfo: Calculated from {{count}} clause severity weights (high·25 / medium·10 / low·3, capped at 100).
contracts.translationMissingClause: EN translation missing — falling back to DE
contracts.extCollabHint: Invite external counsel or consultants into this contract via magic link. They see the contract read-only and — when granted — can leave comments.
contracts.extCollabTokenWarning: This link is shown ONLY ONCE. Share it securely with the external collaborator now.
contracts.extCollabEditFieldsRequired: Select at least one field when 'Edit fields' is enabled
contracts.extCollabIpAllowlistHint: Comma- or newline-separated IPv4/IPv6 addresses or CIDR blocks. Empty = no restriction.
contracts.extActivityHint: Full audit trail per magic link: who opened, commented, edited fields, or triggered a blocked attempt (incl. IP).
contracts.extActivityNoEvents: No external activity for this contract yet.
contracts.extCollabSendEmailHint: Automatically sends a branded invitation with the magic link, expiry date and capabilities to the address above.
contracts.extCollabEmailFailedToast: Magic link created, but the invitation email could not be sent — please share the link manually.
contracts.extCollabEmailStatusFailed: Email delivery failed: {{error}} — please share the link manually.

createDialog.title: New contract
createDialog.description: Pick a deal and contract type — the contract type is mandatory so the CUAD coverage check works immediately.
createDialog.contractTypeHint: Pre-selected based on the template. You can pick a different type at any time.

objection.title: Object to line item
objection.hint: Pick line item(s) and capture the objection.
objection.description: Capture which line items the customer pushed back on.

counterproposal.title: Counter-proposal
counterproposal.description: Customer's structured counter-proposal with concrete deltas.

question.title: Question / objection
question.description: General question or objection without a concrete demand.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.description: Acceptance of the quote – optionally with conditions.

conclude.title: Conclude negotiation
conclude.description: Pick the outcome – the negotiation will be closed.

toasts.reactionWithVersion: Reaction captured – new quote version created

negotiations.title: Negotiations
negotiations.subtitle: Manage active deal negotiations and customer reactions.

startDialog.title: Start negotiation from quote
startDialog.description: Pick an open quote – we'll open a new negotiation for it.
startDialog.noQuotes: No open quotes (draft or sent) available.

negotiations.emptyBody: Negotiations appear once a customer responds to a quote with an objection or counter-proposal.
negotiations.emptyHint: Tip: switch the filter to “All” to also see concluded negotiations.

signatures.title: Signature Center
signatures.subtitle: Manage and track contract signatures.
signatures.emptyBody: Signature packages emerge from sign-ready contracts — start a signature workflow in the contract workspace.
signatures.emptyHint: Tip: switch the filter to “All” to see completed packages.

priceIncreasesList.title: Price Increases
priceIncreasesList.subtitle: Manage pricing campaigns across accounts.
priceIncreasesList.empty: You don't have any price increase campaigns right now.
priceIncreasesList.emptyBody: You don't have any price increase campaigns right now.
priceIncreasesList.emptyHint: Plan price adjustments per contract family and track acceptance vs. rejection rates centrally.

wizard.title: New price-increase campaign
wizard.description: Three steps: campaign basics → pick accounts → review and create.
wizard.step1Subtitle: Name, effective date and currency for this round of letters.
wizard.step2Subtitle: Pick the accounts that will receive a letter and set the default uplift.
wizard.step3Subtitle: Final check before the letters are seeded as drafts.
wizard.name: Campaign name
wizard.noAccounts: No accounts visible to you yet.
wizard.validateName: Please give the campaign a name (at least 2 characters).
wizard.validateAccounts: Please pick at least one account.
wizard.validateUplift: Default uplift must be between 0 and 100.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: All recorded changes across the system

orderConfirmations.title: Order Confirmations
orderConfirmations.subtitle: Confirmed orders and onboarding handover
orderConfirmations.emptyBody: Order confirmations are created automatically from signed contracts that pass all required checks.
orderConfirmations.emptyHint: Tip: once a contract is signed and all onboarding prerequisites are met, a new confirmation appears here.
orderConfirmations.handoverBlocked: Handover requires every required check to be OK.
orderConfirmations.handoverDialogDescription: Set owner, contact and dates for the handover.

copilot.title: Copilot
copilot.emptyScopeEmpty: You don't have access to any companies or brands yet. Ask an admin to grant you a scope so insights for the matching deals show up here.
copilot.emptyScopeFilterExcludesAll: Your active scope filter excludes every deal in this tenant. Widen the filter to see insights again.
copilot.aiRecHint: With confidence display. Your decision improves the model.
copilot.aiRecEmpty: No recommendations yet — captured automatically on AI calls.

aiRecDecided.rejected: Rejected — fed back into the learning loop.

copilot.aiPanelEmpty: No AI analysis yet. Click "Run AI analysis".

renewals.title: Renewals
renewals.subtitle: Auto-renewal contracts approaching their notice deadline, with risk score.
renewals.empty: No renewal opportunities match the filter.
renewals.emptyHint: Tip: the engine detects renewals automatically from contracts with auto-renewal clauses. Reset the filter to see all.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Analytics and forecasting insights.
reports.aiAcceptanceHint: Share of AI recommendations users accepted or modified.
reports.aiAcceptanceWqsHint: Acceptance rate × average confidence of decided recommendations.

leads.title: Leads & Conversion
leads.subtitle: Volume, conversion rate and top sources from the lead inbox.

topSources.title: Top sources
topSources.hint: The five most common lead sources — click opens the lead inbox filtered by source.
topSources.empty: No leads in the selected period.

trendActions.title: Renewals in {{month}}
trendActions.subtitle: {{count}} renewals · {{value}} volume — act directly from the chart.
trendActions.empty: No renewals due in this month.

toast.noOwner: No account manager assigned to this account.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.resolveSubtitle: Account, brand and tenant levels are checked in this order

bundles.subtitle: Combine multiple price positions into reusable packages.
bundles.empty: No bundles yet — create your first one.
bundles.emptyHint: Group recurring positions for faster quoting.
bundles.deleteConfirmBody: Bundle "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. Items already used on quotes are preserved.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.subtitle: Manage tenant settings, companies and users.
admin.planTooltip: Platform-managed — only platform administrators change the plan.
admin.regionTooltip: Platform-managed — data residency is fixed once the tenant is created.
admin.tenantStewardshipNote: Plan and region are centrally maintained by platform administrators. Tenant master data such as name, companies, brands, users and webhooks remains your responsibility.
admin.deleteCompanyBody: {{name}} will be permanently removed. If brands, deals or price positions are linked, the platform blocks the deletion — please clean up first.
admin.deleteCompanyBodySuffix: will be permanently removed. If brands, deals or price positions are linked, the platform blocks the deletion — please clean up first.
admin.deleteBlockedFooter: Please archive or reassign these records first.
admin.incompleteInputBody: Name and legal name are required.
admin.subBrandHint: Optional — Sub-brand under a parent brand.
admin.subBrandHintFull: Optional — Sub-brand under a parent brand (e.g. WFS → weCREATE).
admin.selectCompanyFirstBody: A brand must be assigned to a company.
admin.companyLockedHint: The company of an existing brand cannot be changed.
admin.topLevelBrandHint: Mirrors the company as a top-level brand — you can add sub-brands later.
admin.lightLogoWarning: On white paper (e.g. printed contract) this color is barely visible.
admin.defaultContractTypeHint: Used in "Create contract" when no contract type is explicitly chosen — before falling back to clause families.
admin.documentFooterHint: Defines the legal footer that appears on PDFs (contract / quote): managing director, register, address.
admin.industryProfilesPickHint: Pick companies (full access to all linked brands)…

companyDialog.description: Legal entity inside your tenant — e.g. the operating GmbH or subsidiary. Brand presences live underneath it.
companyDialog.displayNameHint: The name as it appears in DealFlow.
companyDialog.alsoCreateBrandHint: Mirrors the company as a top-level brand — you can add sub-brands (e.g. Premium / Lite) underneath later.
companyDialog.invalidCountryHint: Please use ISO-2 code (e.g. DE, CH, AT).
companyDialog.invalidCurrencyHint: Please use ISO-3 code (e.g. EUR, CHF, USD).

brandDialog.description: Brand presence of a company — defines logo, colors, tone and legal imprint in generated quotes and contracts.
brandDialog.toneHint: Controls phrasing and word choice in generated text.
brandDialog.logoLoadedHint: Click or drop a file to replace.
brandDialog.logoDropzoneHint: PNG, JPEG, SVG, WebP — up to 5 MB
brandDialog.colorsExtracted: Colors derived from logo — you can adjust them below.
brandDialog.sessionExpired: Session expired — please sign in again.
brandDialog.onlyAdminsCanUpload: Only tenant admins may upload logos.
brandDialog.serverBriefly: Server temporarily unreachable. Please retry in a few seconds.

contractTypes.title: Contract Types
contractTypes.subtitle1: A contract type is a template category (e.g.
contractTypes.subtitle2: ). For each type you define which
contractTypes.subtitle4: (e.g. "Confidentiality" for an NDA) and which are
contractTypes.subtitle6: . The clause check warns automatically about deviations.
contractTypes.emptyTitle: No contract types yet. Common examples:

dialog.description: Mandatory and forbidden clauses are evaluated against contracts during the clause check.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.mandatoryHint: These families must appear in every contract of this type.
dialog.forbiddenHint: These families must not appear in a contract of this type.

contractPlaybooks.title: Contract playbooks
contractPlaybooks.subtitle: Allowed and default clause variants per contract type and brand.

dialog.description: Define which clause variants are allowed and which are default for a contract type.
dialog.name: Name

admin.aiRecMetricsHint: Acceptance rate and confidence calibration per prompt. Well calibrated = bars rise with higher confidence.

gdpr.title: GDPR — Data Subject Rights
gdpr.subtitle: Export data, request deletion, review access log and retention rules.
gdpr.forgetConfirm: Pseudonymize this contact? This action cannot be undone.

obligations.title: Obligations
obligations.subtitle: Contractual obligations from active contracts — auto-derived at signature, editable in the contract workspace.
obligations.emptyBody: Obligations are auto-detected at contract signature and managed in the contract workspace.
obligations.emptyHint: Tip: Use the "All open" filter to see active and overdue obligations together.

quoteWizard.title: New Quote
quoteWizard.subtitle: Choose a template, adjust line items and add attachments.
quoteWizard.notesPlaceholder: Internal notes or hints for the customer…
quoteWizard.blankQuoteDescription: No template — add line items and terms manually.
quoteWizard.attachmentsHint: Choose attachments from the library to bundle with this quote.

configurator.title: Industry profile not configured yet
configurator.subtitle: There is no profile for this industry yet. You can still pick a template and attachments; create a profile later to persist defaults.

pricebookPicker.title: Add from Pricebook
pricebookPicker.subtitle: Pick one or more price positions from the catalog.

bundlePicker.title: Add Bundle
bundlePicker.subtitle: Pick a bundle — all included positions will be added to the quote.
bundlePicker.empty: No bundles available — create one under Pricing → Bundles first.

bundleForm.subtitle: Group multiple price positions with quantities and discounts.
bundleForm.noItems: No items yet — add some from the pricebook.

helpBot.title: Help Assistant
helpBot.greeting: Hi! I help you use DealFlow One. Ask me about contracts, pricing or workflows.

scopeSwitcher.title: Active Scope
scopeSwitcher.lockedAria: Scope picker disabled — only one tenant allowed
scopeSwitcher.ambiguousScopeRequiredDesc: Your active scope spans multiple companies/brands. Pick a deal — it will set company and brand for this quote unambiguously. Alternatively, narrow your scope at the top right to a single company + brand.
scopeSwitcher.toastUpdatedDesc: Your active scope has been saved.
scopeSwitcher.wizardHintBody: You are currently working in a filtered scope. Only companies and brands within your active scope can be selected.

quoteEditor.title: Line items
quoteEditor.namePlaceholder: Name the line or pick from pricebook…
quoteEditor.empty: No lines yet — add an item or section heading.
quoteEditor.shortcutEnter: Enter inserts a new row directly after the active one
quoteEditor.shortcutBackspace: Backspace on an empty name removes the row
quoteEditor.shortcutCmdEnter: Adds a new item from anywhere
quoteEditor.newQuoteChoice: How would you like to start?
quoteEditor.newInlineDesc: Lexoffice-style — drag, drop, live PDF, pricebook.
